title: Absentee Carpet & Upholstery Business Established Clients
reasonForSelling: The seller are selling to pursue other interests.
description:
Absentee Owned Northern California Carpet & Upholstery Cleaning Franchise - Rich Growth Territory! - SC2254

This carpet and upholstery cleaning franchise is a Northern California Limited Liability Company and has been in operation for the past 15 years and under the current ownership for the past 1.5 years. They provide a number of services, including carpet cleaning, upholstery cleaning, and other cleaning service ranging from tile & grout cleaning to commercial floor care, leather cleaning and hardwood floor cleaning. Their non-toxic cleaning solutions are environmentally friendly and safe for children & pets! Their unique method of carpet cleaning allows for your carpet to be dry within 1 hour after cleaning, and they also offer a 30 day no spot return guarantee. This is an absentee owned business, with Sellers only working very sporadically in the business. This leads to tremendous growth potential.

Growth can be obtained through increased marketing and social presence, in particular targeting businesses in their local community. This business does approximately 60% of Revenue in Residential and 40% in Commercial. Target growth opportunities could be apartment complexes, property management owned properties, commercial businesses, churches and clubhouses to name a few. This business has tremendous growth potential as marketing is greatly needed and new account addition should be easy with the right amount of attention in the business.

Financing Comments
